title: Introduction to the SonarScanner for .NET | SonarQube Cloud Documentation
content:
# Introduction to the SonarScanner for .NET

## [Analysis process with the SonarScanner for .NET](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/advanced-setup/ci-based-analysis/sonarscanner-for-dotnet/introduction/#analysis-process "Analysis process with the SonarScanner for .NET")

To run an analysis using the SonarScanner for .NET, you first need to make your code analysis work and set up your PR decoration. The final step is to integrate the coverage import.

1. [Install the prerequisites](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/advanced-setup/ci-based-analysis/sonarscanner-for-dotnet/installing/ "Install the prerequisites") in your environment (Java).

2. Download the correct SonarScanner version for your .NET runtime, and install it on your CI.

3. Then [work on your pipeline](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/advanced-setup/ci-based-analysis/sonarscanner-for-dotnet/using/ "work on your pipeline");

  - specify your Begin step arguments to prepare your project for analysis,
  - Build your project which will generate the analysis data,
  - and define the End step arguments to collect the analysis data.

4. Finally, focus your analysis as part of your build process by setting up your [test coverage](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/enriching/test-coverage/dotnet-test-coverage/ "test coverage") using a third-party tool to access important metrics.

## [Related pages](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/advanced-setup/ci-based-analysis/sonarscanner-for-dotnet/introduction/#related-pages "Related pages")

[Installing the SonarScanner for .NET](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/advanced-setup/ci-based-analysis/sonarscanner-for-dotnet/installing/ "Installing the SonarScanner for .NET")

[Using the SonarScanner for .NET](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/advanced-setup/ci-based-analysis/sonarscanner-for-dotnet/using/ "Using the SonarScanner for .NET")

[Configuring the SonarScanner for .NET](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/advanced-setup/ci-based-analysis/sonarscanner-for-dotnet/configuring/ "Configuring the SonarScanner for .NET")
